<!-- title: Text (TeaScript) -->
<!-- pageid: 1138 -->
<!-- revid: 8730 -->
<!-- timestamp: 2023-10-18T02:10:19Z -->
<!-- source: https://wohlsoft.ru/pgewiki/Text_(TeaScript) -->

[[Category:TeaScript.vbs]]
Text is a class in TeaScript.vbs that allows you to read/write values for text.

=Creating a Text=
To create a text object use the <code>TxtCreate</code> function.
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">
call TxtCreate(index, x, y, sasc, easc, cdata, lnum, fontid, flag, text)
</syntaxhighlight>

For more information visit the [[Functions_(TeaScript)#TxtCreate|TxtCreate ]] documentation.


=Using the Text Class=
To read the value of <code>Text</code> do:
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">
Text(index).name
</syntaxhighlight>

To change the value of <code>Text</code> do:
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">
Text(index).name = value
</syntaxhighlight>


Where index is an unique identifier defined when creating the text object.


=Text Properties=
=====Physical Properties=====
{{Tea_table|1=  
  {{Tea_row|string|text|-|The text shown.}}
  {{Tea_row|double|x|-|The x coordinate. It uses screen or scene coordinates based on its flag in TxtCreate.}}
  {{Tea_row|double|y|-|The y coordinate. It uses screen or scene coordinates based on its flag in TxtCreate.}}
}}

=====Graphical Properties=====
{{Tea_table|1=  
  {{Tea_row|double|zpos|-|The priority of the text. Foreground is 0 and background is 1.}}
  {{Tea_row|double|hide|-|Determines if the text is hidden.(0: Show text; 1: Hide text)}}
  {{Tea_row|double|forecolor|-|An overlay hue added to the text. Setting this value to 0 makes the player invisible, setting it to -1 returns it to default. Use the <code>rgba(red, green, blue, alpha)</code> function to choose a specific hue.}}
  {{Tea_row|double|forecolor_r|-|The red value of the hue described in 'forecolor'. Should be a value between 0 to 255. Use this value to read and get only the red component.}}
  {{Tea_row|double|forecolor_g|-|The green value of the hue described in 'forecolor'. Should be a value between 0 to 255. Use this value to read and get only the green component.}}
  {{Tea_row|double|forecolor_b|-|The blue value of the hue described in 'forecolor'. Should be a value between 0 to 255. Use this value to read and get only the blue component.}}
  {{Tea_row|double|forecolor_a|-|The alpha value of the hue described in 'forecolor'. Should be a value between 0 to 255. Use this value to read and get only the alpha component.}}
}}

=====Other=====
{{Tea_table|1=  
  {{Tea_row|double|width|-|The number of characters of a single row in the NPC image file.}}
  {{Tea_row|double|foreground|-|Set this to 0 and the text created will be hidden. Set this to 1 and the text will be visible.}}
}}

=====Unknown=====
{{Tea_table|1=  
  {{Tea_row|double|height|-|Unknown}}
}}

=Oddities and Quirks=
Below is a list of certain quirks text have that does not conform to standard behavior or simply other miscellaneous behavior.
